### Summary

Describe the change at a high level.  Reference the related issue or story link (e.g., `Fixes #12`).

### Checklist

- [ ] I have linked the relevant issue/story.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are fully implemented.
- [ ] I have added or updated tests.
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, runbook, ADR, etc.) where necessary.
- [ ] Code has been reviewed by at least one teammate.
- [ ] CI pipeline passes.

### Screenshots / Demo (if applicable)

Include screenshots or a short description of the behavior for UI changes or new features.

### Additional Notes

Add any context that reviewers should be aware of (e.g., trade‑offs, known issues).
